parameters.query:
-- Update employer status and position
UPDATE "employersData"
SET 
  "status_funcionario" = '{{ $json.record.Status }}',
  "nome_cargo_funcionario" = '{{ $json.record.Cargo }}',
  "updated_at" = (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
WHERE "matricula_funcionario" = '{{ $json.record.Matricula }}'
  AND (
    "status_funcionario" IS DISTINCT FROM '{{ $json.record.Status }}'
    OR "nome_cargo_funcionario" IS DISTINCT FROM '{{ $json.record.Cargo }}'
  )
RETURNING "matricula_funcionario", "nome_funcionario", "status_funcionario", "nome_cargo_funcionario";

-- Delete employers that exist in DB but not in API
DELETE FROM "employersData"
WHERE "matricula_funcionario" NOT IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT "matricula_funcionario"
  FROM "employersData"
  WHERE "matricula_funcionario" = ANY(ARRAY[{{ $json.matriculas_list }}]::text[])
)
RETURNING "matricula_funcionario", "nome_funcionario";
